info.description:
API allowing access to EG4 Inverter data
Supporting both Monitoring and Control Functionalities
info.title: EG4 Monitoring And Control API

get.summary: Get Revenue Grade Meter information for target inverter.
Get settings information for target inverter.

post.description: Charge settings supported: AC Charging, Charging Battery Last, Time-based AC Charge, Voltage-based AC Charge, SOC-based AC Charge
post.summary: Set battery charging settings for target inverter

post.description: Discharge settings supported: SOC-based Cutoff, Voltage-based Cutoff, Timing-based, DischargePower-based Cutoff
post.summary: Set battery discharging settings for target inverter

post.description: Forced discharge settings supported: SOC-based Cutoff, Voltage-based Cutoff, Timing-based, DischargePower-based Cutoff
post.summary: Set forced discharging settings for target inverter

get.summary: Get the current state of target inverter.
Get the current energy info of target inverter.
Get the current state of target inverter, v2 includes battery capacity wH
Get the current energy info of target inverter. V2 Includes total aggregate counters

get.description: Given two times t1, t2, returns all inverter state changes in range t1 to t2 - sorted
get.summary: Get segment of history for target inverter
